description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a modern, urban outfit. He wears a hooded jacket with a high collar, slim-fit pants, and slip-on shoes, giving him a contemporary streetwear appearance. The figure has a compact crossbody pouch strapped to his right hip, adding a practical accessory to his ensemble. His hands are relaxed and open, and his facial features are sharp with a short, textured hairstyle. The overall build is athletic and proportionate, with a slightly broad-shouldered stance. The materials and finish suggest a matte, fabric-like texture for the clothing and a semi-soft, realistic skin surface for the exposed hands and face.
description: A modern adult male in urban streetwear with a hooded jacket, slim pants, and a crossbody pouch. He stands upright with a short, textured hairstyle and relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded jacket, slim pants, crossbody pouch, and relaxed hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the pouch on the right hip, and the slip-on shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded jacket, the pouch strap, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the clean profile of the jacket, pants, and the absence of accessories on this side.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded jacket, slim-fit pants, crossbody pouch
